prompt_inputs.goal: Marathon training - sustained energy for long-distance running

solution_criteria: Meal plan emphasizes complex carbohydrates as primary energy source for endurance
Includes adequate hydration guidance throughout the day
Distributes calories evenly across 4-6 meals/snacks to maintain sustained energy levels
Plan is compact and fits within a single day format
task_description: Write a compact, concise, 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a sport requiring high endurance and sustained energy (e.g., marathon runner) to verify the meal plan emphasizes complex carbohydrates, adequate hydration, and distributed calorie intake throughout the day

prompt_inputs.goal: Muscle recovery and strength building for competitive weightlifting

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers exactly 1 day with all meals and snacks specified
Protein is distributed across all meals (minimum 25g per meal) to support muscle recovery
Includes post-workout nutrition within 1-2 hours of training with carbohydrates and protein
Incorporates micronutrient-dense foods (iron, magnesium, zinc, B vitamins) relevant to strength athletes
task_description: Write a compact, concise, 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a sport requiring rapid muscle recovery and strength building (e.g., weightlifter) to ensure the meal plan prioritizes adequate protein distribution, micronutrient density, and post-workout nutrition timing

prompt_inputs.goal: optimize performance and recovery for competitive gymnastics

solution_criteria: Meal plan is 1 day, compact format with breakfast, lunch, dinner, and snacks
All meals and snacks are vegan-compliant with no animal products
Nutritionally supports gymnastics performance with adequate protein, carbohydrates, and micronutrients for a 58kg athlete
Meals are practical and realistic to prepare within a single day
task_description: Write a compact, concise, 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with an athlete having specific dietary restrictions (e.g., vegan gymnast) to confirm the meal plan accommodates performance needs while maintaining ethical or health-based constraints without compromising nutritional completeness
